title: oncidium × rolfei
intro: Oncidium × rolfei is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross-breeding of Oncidium spp. with other orchids, specifically in the genus Miltonia. Traditionally, Oncidium × rolfei has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncidium × rolfei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Oncidium × rolfei often involve drying and processing the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
